sources.name: D.C. Board of Elections 2026 primary calendar
D.C. Code, mayor term begins noon January 2

candidates.name: Kenyan McDuffie
candidates.summary_for_prompts: McDuffie frames his platform around public safety, affordability, economic development, child care, and government accountability.

candidates.name: Janeese Lewis George
candidates.summary_for_prompts: George frames her platform around affordability, tenant protections, public services, safe streets, transit, bike lanes, and a larger housing production target.

metrics.label: D.C. real GDP
metrics.primary_source: Bureau of Economic Analysis GDP by state

metrics.label: Bike lane route miles
metrics.primary_source: DC Open Data / District Department of Transportation Bicycle Lanes
metrics.series_definition: Route miles are sum(LENGTH) / 1609.344. Lane-miles are also available by multiplying segment length by TOTALBIKELANES, but this forecast target uses route miles.

metrics.label: Traffic fatalities
metrics.primary_source: DC Open Data / District Department of Transportation Crashes in DC
metrics.series_definition: Sum FATAL_BICYCLIST, FATAL_DRIVER, FATAL_PEDESTRIAN, FATALPASSENGER, and FATALOTHER by report year.

metrics.label: Housing permits
metrics.primary_source: U.S. Census Bureau Building Permits Survey
metrics.unit: new privately owned housing units authorized by building permits
metrics.series_definition: District of Columbia row, Total column in state annual and monthly BPS workbooks.
metrics.limitation: The Census starts release does not publish D.C.-level housing starts. This harness uses D.C.-level permit authorizations as the primary-source proxy.
